Class Student

java.lang.Object
users.User
users.Student
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Researcher
Direct Known Subclasses:
BachelorStudent, GraduateStudent
public class Student extends User implements Researcher
Represents a student who can enroll in courses, receive marks, calculate GPA, and optionally participate in research activity.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Student

      public Student(String id, String login, String password, String name, String email, String major, int yearOfStudy)

  • Method Details

    • registerForCourse

      public void registerForCourse(Course course) throws CreditLimitException, CourseAlreadyRegisteredException
      Registers the student for a course if duplicate and credit-limit checks pass.
      Parameters:
      course - the course to register for
      Throws:
      CreditLimitException - if total credits would exceed 21
      CourseAlreadyRegisteredException - if the student is already enrolled

    • viewCourses

      public List<Course> viewCourses()

    • viewMarks

      public List<Mark> viewMarks()

    • getTranscript

      public Transcript getTranscript()

    • calculateGpa

      public double calculateGpa()
      Recalculates GPA based on the student's current marks.
      Returns:
      GPA on a 4.0 scale

    • addMark

      public void addMark(Course course, Mark mark)
      Adds or replaces a mark for the given course and refreshes GPA and failed course statistics.
      Parameters:
      course - the course for which the mark is assigned
      mark - the mark to store

    • hasCourse

      public boolean hasCourse(Course course)

    • hasPassedCourse

      public boolean hasPassedCourse(String courseId)

    • canRegisterForMoreCourses

      public boolean canRegisterForMoreCourses()
      Checks whether the student is still eligible to register for new courses.
      Returns:
      true if failed courses count is below the limit

    • becomeResearcher

      public void becomeResearcher()
      Activates researcher mode for the student.

      Deactivates researcher mode for the student.
